About Us
Our Story
There’s a certain kind of bar that lives forever in your memory — not because it was fancy, but because it was honest. The floors were sticky, the jukebox never missed, and the drinks? Strong, cheap, and exactly what you needed. Close Company is that bar reborn, re-imagined, and rebuilt by the folks who give a damn about cocktails. It’s the unbuttoned, unpretentious younger sister of Death & Co: a little louder, a little looser, and unapologetically fun. A bit of grit, a lot of soul, and no bullshit. Just great drinks, good people, and a hell of a time.
